suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-06-09 False positive: CVE-2025-21199 applies to Microsoft Azure Agent and Site Recovery. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - applicationinsights-core 3.7.8 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-07-03 False positive: CVE-2026-54515 applies to jackson libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - jackson-databind 2.22.0 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.
